name: Cvent Event Management API
what_it_does: Cvent REST API for enterprise event management platform. Enables AI agents to query event data, retrieve attendee registrations, access session schedules, manage venue data, and integrate event intelligence into marketing and operations workflows. Cvent is the leading enterprise event management platform for large conferences, corporate meetings, and virtual events.
use_cases: Querying event registration status and attendee data from event operations agents
Retrieving session schedules and speaker information from event logistics agents
Accessing event performance metrics and attendance analytics from marketing agents
Integrating Cvent event data into CRM and marketing automation from sales agents
not_for: Consumer event ticketing (use Eventbrite for that)
Small events without enterprise management needs
best_when: An enterprise events team using Cvent wants AI agents to surface attendee insights, automate logistics workflows, and integrate event data into CRM and marketing systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Attendee data including contact information and preferences is personal data. GDPR and CCPA compliance required for event registration data.

auth.notes: Cvent OAuth 2.0 with client credentials. App registration in Cvent developer portal. Enterprise accounts required.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise event management pricing; negotiated per organization
pricing.notes: Enterprise event platform with significant investment. API access included with Cvent subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Cvent API: rate limits per application and endpoint

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Attendee registration data is personal data — GDPR and CCPA compliance required
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Cvent API access requires enterprise agreement and developer portal registration
Event data model is complex — Events, Sessions, Attendees, Registrations are separate objects
GDPR right-to-erasure applies to attendee personal data — design accordingly
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Event attendee PII including contact information and session preferences. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth2.

security_score_components.security_notes: Attendee PII and event registration data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EU data residency. OAuth2 enterprise auth.
